summary: Fix missing/blank Structure page by wiring route, template, bootstrap, API, renderer, and DB-backed snapshot flow.
root_cause: No committed structure page route in app/web/router.py
No structure branch in app/static/app.js bootPage()
No structure tables in SQLite schema
workflow_optimization: Stop appending new page logic into monolithic app/static/app.js
Introduce page registry and page-scoped boot functions
Add loading/empty/error states for every new chart page
Log page boot, API result counts, renderer readiness, and resize events

target_files.reason: Add nav entry and structure-template markup.
Register structure page boot flow; ideally extract structure page logic to dedicated module.
Add structure page layout, chart host sizing, loading/empty/error states.
Assemble snapshot payload for structure page.
Read/write structure snapshots and overlay geometry.

acceptance_targets.page_load: < 1.5s local first paint for structure page shell
acceptance_targets.empty_state: Must display explicit empty message when candles or overlays are unavailable
acceptance_targets.error_state: Must display explicit error card when API or renderer fails
